highlights.text: Search — Gmail query syntax for precise message filtering
Read & threads — full message content with thread grouping
Send — compose and send email through your Workspace account

readme:
### What it does

Google Workspace MCP connects your AI agent to Gmail through the official Google API. It provides tools for searching messages with Gmail query syntax, reading full message content, viewing threaded conversations, sending email, and managing labels.

This community plugin is maintained by Anthropic and targets Google Workspace (business) accounts, though it works with any Gmail account.

### Community plugin

This is a curated community plugin implementing the `email-v1` service contract. It provides a simpler, Google-native alternative to the Gmail Blade for users who want basic email operations without the Gemini AI classification features.

### Setup

Setup requires a Google Cloud project with the Gmail API enabled and OAuth 2.0 credentials. On first run, the plugin opens a browser for the standard Google consent flow. The `gmail.modify` scope allows read, send, and label operations.

### Comparison with Gmail Blade

| Feature | Google Workspace MCP | Gmail Blade |
|---------|---------------------|-------------|
| Maintainer | Anthropic (community) | Sidereal (certified) |
| AI features | None | Gemini classification + summarisation |
| Setup | OAuth only | OAuth + optional Gemini key |
| Write gating | Not gated | Explicit write gate |

setup.help_text: Create a Google Cloud project, enable the Gmail API, create OAuth 2.0 credentials, and complete the consent flow on first run.
prerequisites: Google Cloud project with Gmail API enabled
setup.blurb: Google Workspace email via Gmail API — search, read, send, labels, threads

scenarios.label: Search and summarise recent threads
scenarios.body: Search for messages from the past week matching a keyword, read the full threads, and provide a summary of key action items and decisions.

scenarios.label: Organise inbox with labels
scenarios.body: Scan unread messages, categorise them by project or urgency, apply the appropriate Gmail labels, and report which messages need immediate attention.

notes: Curated third-party plugin. Not yet conformance-tested against email-v1. Listed for future multi-provider email routing.
